_profile_notes.description: Large family home in Munich (5 persons, 180 m²). Very high electricity use (home office, EV already contemplated, pool pump), oil heating (expensive fuel, strong HP benefit), long commute with a large petrol SUV. Optimal south-facing large roof, minimal shading. Favourable loan terms. Maximum benefit from all upgrade technologies.
_profile_notes.electricity_kwh: 7,200 kWh/yr — 5 persons, home office, heat pump ready wiring, no current PV
_profile_notes.heating_kwh: 3,200 litres oil — 180 m² older detached house, cavity wall insulation only
_profile_notes.mileage_km: 28,000 km/yr — long daily commute + weekend trips in a large SUV
_profile_notes.roof: 60 m² usable, south-facing, 35° tilt, minimal shading (0.05) — detached house, unobstructed
_profile_notes.financing: 20 yr @ 3.5% — excellent credit, green mortgage product, longer term lowers monthly burden
